prompt:
Two problems with the docs-site theme crate, probably both mine, both from Friday's tidy-up commit, and I'm out of patience with them. First it flat out doesn't build anymore:

    error: expected one of `.`, `;`, `?`, or an operator, found `Iosevka`
      --> src/lib.rs

which reads like the compiler is upset about the design team's font name, and I refuse to believe the font name is the problem — that constant hasn't changed in months (I did reformat around it though). Second, QA filed a ticket from before the build broke: in the generated CSS, the accent rule for links comes out literally as

    a.accent { color: {accent}; }

as in the WORD accent in curly braces where the palette hex color should be. Every theme, every palette.

cargo test --offline needs to end up green — tests/themecss.rs pins the exact CSS text we ship, including the quoted font-family list, so please don't 'simplify' any of the expected output. tests/, Cargo.toml and .gitignore stay as they are; the fix belongs in src/.
